CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, content TEXT);
SELECT id, length(content) AS length FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, length(content) AS length FROM test_strings WHERE length(content) > 5;
SELECT t1.id, length(t1.content) AS string_length, t2.length AS total_length FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN (SELECT SUM(length(content)) AS length FROM test_strings) AS t2 ON 1=1;
SELECT (SELECT length(content) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) + (SELECT length(content) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2) AS combined_length;
WITH lengths AS (SELECT id, length(content) AS str_length FROM test_strings) SELECT AVG(str_length) FROM lengths;
SELECT id, content, length(content) FROM test_strings WHERE length(content) = (SELECT MAX(length(content)) FROM test_strings);
INSERT INTO special_chars VALUES ('😄'), ('Hello, world!'), ('DuckDB is great!'), ('1234567890'), ('\n\t\r\'"');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM special_chars WHERE length(string_val) < 10;
SELECT MIN(length(string_val)), MAX(length(string_val)), AVG(length(string_val)) FROM special_chars;
